original_abstract: This review will highlight several recent and lesser-reviewed works related to the preparation of chiral nanographenes, specifically focusing on structures prepared by non-Scholl methods.
humanized_abstract: Recent studies on the preparation of chiral nanographenes are reported, with an emphasis on lesser reviewed work such as structures synthesised using non-Scholl approaches.

document.output: Recent studies on the preparation of chiral nanographenes are reported, with an emphasis on lesser reviewed work such as structures synthesised using non-Scholl approaches.
document.input: This review will highlight several recent and lesser-reviewed works related to the preparation of chiral nanographenes, specifically focusing on structures prepared by non-Scholl methods.
